dialogueChunks.intro: You've done it. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been found, shaken but alive. {quest_threat_The} is broken, at least for now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement is overjoyed. {quest_ally} has been tending to the rescued and says they'll recover in time. What you did out there took real courage, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.outro: You've earned more than gratitude. This settlement will remember what you did when {quest_stakes_the} hung in the balance.

dialogueChunks.intro: You found the place, but {quest_focus_the} was already moved on. The camp was abandoned in haste. Still, you've shattered {quest_threat_the}'s hold on this region.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It's not the ending we wanted, but the {enemy_type} lost fighters, supplies, and their element of surprise. {quest_ally} says the intelligence you recovered will help prevent this from happening again.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes a partial victory is all we get. You did everything you could for {quest_stakes_the}, and that matters.

dialogueChunks.intro: Not only did you free {quest_focus_the}, you turned the captors' own camp against them. The {enemy_type} scattered when they realized they'd lost everything.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} can hardly believe the report. The supplies you seized from {quest_threat_the} will sustain us for weeks. The prisoners you freed are spreading word of what you did.
dialogueChunks.outro: You didn't just solve a problem: you sent a message. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} secure, and the {enemy_type} will think twice before crossing this settlement again.
